The Docker entrypoint does not override or validate this value. Any Kimai instance deployed using the Docker image without explicitly setting `APP_SECRET` runs with a publicly-known...

items.title: CISA KEV: CVE-2008-4128 affecting Cisco IOS
items.summary: Cisco IOS 12.4 contains multiple cross-site forgery vulnerabilities that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via (1) a certain "show privilege" command to the /level/15/exec/- URI, and (2) a certain "alias exec" command to the /level/15/exec/-/configure/http URI.

items.summary: ### Summary Two-factor authentication (TOTP) can be fully bypassed for the REST API.
